title: pelargonium × aceroides
intro: Pelargonium × aceroides, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the crossing of Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The Rose Geranium offers various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing and skin issues. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × aceroides include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
